description: Every Stripe feature, plus a local SQLite mirror with FTS, cross-entity SQL, and analytics no other Stripe tool ships.

novel_features.name: Customer health score
novel_features.description: Compute a 0-100 health score for one or many customers from local SQLite, factoring in failed-payment count, dispute history, MRR contribution, subscription status, and account age.

novel_features.name: Dunning queue
novel_features.description: List invoices in past_due/uncollectible state ranked by days-overdue, with last failure reason and customer email pulled from the local store.

novel_features.name: Cross-entity SQL
novel_features.description: Run read-only SQLite queries against the local Stripe mirror. All synced data lives in a generic 'resources' table — query with json_extract(data, '$.field') and filter by resource_type.

novel_features.name: Payout reconciliation pivot
novel_features.description: Join payouts to balance_transactions to charges to customers from local store; flag missing balance_transactions and mismatches; CSV export.

novel_features.name: Customer 360 dossier
novel_features.description: One-shot dossier: customer profile + active subs + recent invoices + payment methods + recent charges + open disputes + lifetime spend.

novel_features.name: Subscriptions at risk
novel_features.description: List subscriptions whose default payment method's card expires in a window, sorted by current MRR contribution.

novel_features.name: Agent-shaped events since cursor
novel_features.description: Fetch all Events since a cursor, persist new cursor in profile, no daemon. One-shot replacement for stripe-cli's listen daemon.

novel_features.name: Metadata grep
novel_features.description: Search every synced resource's metadata bag for a key/value across resource types; returns (resource_type, id, matched_kv) rows.
